General.Name: Dongwu Cement International Ltd
General.Description: Dongwu Cement International Limited, an investment holding company, engages in production and sale of cement under the Dongwu brand name in the People's Republic of China. The company operates through Production and Sale of Cement; Production and Sale of Magnetic Materials and Other Application Products; and Trading Business segments. It offers ordinary and composite Portland cement, as well as clinker as a by-product; sells motor machines and parts, rare earth materials, metals, and anode materials and oxides; and electroplating and processing, and calcination services. The company is also involved in the sewage and sludge treatment activities; science and technology investment business; investment management and consultation activities; and production and sale of magnetic materials and other application products. In addition, it engages in the research and development of biotechnology. The company was incorporated in 2011 and is based in Suzhou, China. Dongwu Cement International Limited operates as a subsidiary of Goldview Development Limited.
